---
title: eCH-3582 Some Fancy Standard
abstract: This is just some dummy file. It's used to test the pipeline.
date: today
date-format: long
---

# Introduction

This repo is supposed to harmonize pipelines for semantic web projects. @berners2023semantic envisioned the semantic web as an internet of data compared to an internet of documents.

## We can have sub-headings

And write some text.

### Also sub-sub-headings

And write some more text. Maybe even with a pretty image.

![Always add some text to describe what the image shows.](https://fastly.picsum.photos/id/653/536/354.jpg?hmac=3InR8I5KmwbdkPHehlM8BMPd_BDHG_RWZkxt_IkeQGY){#fig-example}

When displaying diagrams, try to write them in Mermaid JS straight away; this makes changes in the future or translations straightforward.

``` {mermaid}
sequenceDiagram
    loop Daily query
        Alice->>Bob: Hello Bob, how are you?
        alt is sick
            Bob->>Alice: Not so good :(
        else is well
            Bob->>Alice: Feeling fresh like a daisy
        end

        opt Extra response
            Bob->>Alice: Thanks for asking
        end
    end
```

# Technical notes

We use the ROBOT CLI in our project [@jackson2019robot], especially for it's ability to run the HermiT reasoner [@glimm2014hermit].

# Appendix {.appendix}

# References {.appendix}

::: {#refs}
:::
